steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to the tracking section
Select and record current emotions and moods
tests.expected_result: Emotions and moods are recorded successfully

tests.scenario: View summary of tracked emotions and moods
steps: Log in as a user
Track emotions and moods over time
Navigate to the summary section
View graphical representation of tracked data
tests.expected_result: Graphical representation of tracked data is displayed

steps: Log in as a user with a subscription
Navigate to the premium features section
Verify access to all premium features
tests.expected_result: All premium features are accessible without restrictions

tests.scenario: Verify secure handling of user data
steps: Log in as a user
Collect user data
Verify data encryption and storage in accordance with regulations
tests.expected_result: User data is encrypted and stored securely

steps: Log in as a user
Track emotions and moods over time
Navigate to the recommendations section
View tailored suggestions for managing mental health
tests.expected_result: Tailored suggestions for managing mental health are displayed

tests.scenario: Set and track mental health goals
steps: Log in as a user
Set a mental health goal
Navigate to the goal progress section
View progress towards achieving the goal
tests.expected_result: Progress towards achieving the goal is displayed

steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to the resources section
Verify access to a list of relevant resources and support
tests.expected_result: List of relevant resources and support is displayed

steps: Simulate a technical issue or error
Verify error message and redirection to support page
tests.expected_result: Error message is displayed and user is redirected to support page

steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to the preferences section
Make changes to preferences
Verify changes are saved and applied
tests.expected_result: Changes to preferences are saved and applied

steps: Log in as a user
Track emotions and moods over time
Navigate to the export section
Export tracked data in a compatible format
tests.expected_result: Tracked data is exported successfully in a compatible format
